description: Detects raw new/delete and C-style malloc/free in C++ -- prefer smart pointers and std::make_unique/std::make_shared. Simplified from Rust: flags all new_expression and delete_expression nodes (warning severity) without filtering smart-pointer constructors, NOLINT suppression, destructor context detection, or C-style malloc/calloc/realloc/free detection. Precision reduced compared to Rust.

flag.message: Raw new/delete detected -- use std::make_unique or std::make_shared instead; smart pointers handle deallocation automatically
